summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EDGE Document Processor iteration 2. All backend APIs working perfectly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend functionality excellent with all major features working including new EDGE Rules Engine, batch processing, and specialized EEM22 analysis. Minor modal overlay issue in create project dialog.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepting button clicks during form submission
ui_bugs.workaround: Dialog opens and fields can be filled correctly, only final submission affected

passed_tests: Project CRUD operations (create, read, list, delete)
File upload with LED luminaire data
File upload with water fixture data
Project detail navigation with 4 tabs (Archivos, Datos Extraidos, Compliance EDGE, Resumen)
Batch progress modal with real-time updates
Compliance EDGE tab showing WBS validation and coverage
Datos Extraidos tab with specialized EEM22 luminaire analysis
Resumen tab with category breakdown and progress
Create project dialog opens and form fields work
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay z-index issue in create project dialog to allow proper form submission. Consider adding force=True to click actions or adjusting CSS z-index values.
